# Context Manager Extension - AI Assistant Instructions

## Available Context Projects (0 enabled):

## @usevibe Commands:
- `@usevibe status` - Overview of all context projects
- `@usevibe tasks` - Show all TODO items
- `@usevibe news` - Recent changes (last 7 days)
- `@usevibe sync all` - Update all Git repos
- `@usevibe @projectname [query]` - Query specific project
